description: Discover a simple yet effective way to promote your business with our email template tailored for agencies and companies alike. Perfect for showcasing your design portfolio, this email layout is seamlessly optimized for service promotion, marketing, and design sectors. Its clean, minimalist design ensures your marketing messages are delivered in the most impactful way. With a focus on simplicity, it allows your portfolio to take center stage, making it an excellent tool for agencies seeking to display their work and attract potential clients. Boost your business visibility and make a lasting impression with this intuitively designed email template.
short_description: Promote your business effectively with our email template designed for agencies and companies. Perfect for showcasing design portfolios in service promotion, marketing, and design sectors. Simple, impactful, and portfolio-focused. Boost business visibility today.

designer.description:
I have gained experience and skills in communications and organization of the work while I was hired in E.Miroglio EAD. I’ve also got excellent French as I was living in France for a few years.

About an year ago, I’ve started designing interfaces and that’s definitely what I was looking for my whole life. I’m using Adobe Photoshop to design websites, emails and mobile apps. I also create prototypes in InVision to make the whole process from the start to the finish much easier.
